name: Ent Credit Union
description_short: Ent Credit Union is a Colorado-based credit union offering checking, savings, loans, and business banking with 60+ years of experience and multiple locations across the state.
description_long:
Ent Credit Union was founded over 60 years ago with the mission of bringing credit services to Colorado residents. The organization operates as a member-owned credit union with multiple service centers throughout the state, including their downtown Denver LoDo location housed in the historic 1919 Steelbridge building. As a credit union, Ent serves individuals, homeowners, professionals, commuters, students, and those new to banking and investing.

Ent offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services including deposit accounts (checking and savings), auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, business banking products, and instant-issue Visa debit cards. Members can access services through multiple channels: in-person at physical locations during lobby hours (9am-5:30pm weekdays at the LoDo center), through a 24-hour walk-up ATM, via their website, or through their mobile banking app. Online services include account creation, balance viewing, transaction history, loan payments, and fund transfers.

Ent distinguishes itself through personalized service delivered by Member Service Representatives who live and work in their local communities. The credit union emphasizes competitive interest rates and a willingness to work with members who don't initially qualify for low-interest loans, offering financial guidance and debt consolidation strategies. Their mortgage loan officer is highlighted for his listening skills and availability throughout the borrowing process, while their business banker brings 12 years of local Denver market experience.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Ent operates on a member-ownership model and emphasizes community relationships. However, the website provides limited information about specific rates, fees, or comparative advantages. The LoDo location, while conveniently situated downtown, has standard business hours (closed weekends) despite offering 24-hour ATM access, which may limit accessibility for some members.
address: 123 S Weber St, Colorado Springs, CO 80903

company_info.headquarters: 123 S Weber St, Colorado Springs, CO 80903

pros: Member-owned credit union structure with 60+ year track record in Colorado
Multiple service channels: in-person, online account creation, mobile app, and 24-hour ATM access
Personalized service from Member Service Representatives embedded in local communities
Competitive interest rates marketed for auto loans, personal loans, and mortgages
Willingness to work with members on credit building and debt consolidation despite lower credit scores
Instant-issue Visa debit cards available at service centers
Business banking specialist (Dan Arkulary) with 12 years of local market experience
Mortgage loan officer provides continuity through entire borrowing process
cons: LoDo service center lobby hours limited to weekdays 9am-5:30pm (closed weekends), despite 24-hour ATM
Website does not display current interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules for comparison
No mention of online account opening completion or specific digital onboarding details
Limited information about membership eligibility requirements or field of membership restrictions
best_for: Colorado residents seeking a member-owned alternative to traditional banks
Homeowners and professionals in the Denver metro area looking for personalized mortgage and loan services
Small business owners in Colorado needing local relationship-based business banking
Members interested in credit building and debt consolidation with personalized guidance
diagnosis: Ent Credit Union is best for Colorado residents and Denver-area members seeking community-focused, personalized banking services with competitive rates and flexibility on credit qualification. The main caveat is that specific rates, fees, and membership eligibility criteria are not disclosed on their website, requiring direct contact to compare offerings against other financial institutions.
services: Business banking products and business accounts
